summary: Iteration 278 - Crystalline Seeds API & Seed Gallery Testing. ALL FEATURES WORKING: Backend API (20/20 tests passed) - mint, gallery, stats, filters, visibility toggle, rarity calculation. Frontend - RecursiveDivePage renders at /recursive-dive with 9×9 grid (81 cells), cell selection, double-tap DIVE (L0→L1→L2→L3), VOID ESCAPE at L3+, Surface/Mint Seed buttons. SeedGalleryPage renders at /seed-gallery with stats panel, constellation visualizations, filter dropdowns (rarity/depth/language), seed detail modal with 36-bit address and journey path. UPDATED: mintSeed now saves to BOTH localStorage AND backend API.

integration_issues.issue: Console shows 'Maximum update depth exceeded' error repeatedly - inherited from previous iterations
integration_issues.details: This error indicates a useEffect dependency issue causing infinite re-renders. Does not break functionality but impacts performance.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Fix React infinite loop - likely in useSentientRegistry.js or useZeroPointFlicker.js useEffect dependencies
critical_code_review_comments: seeds.py: Well-structured API with proper rarity calculation algorithm (depth, language, sacred hexagrams, dwell history, address patterns)
SeedGalleryPage.js: Clean implementation with ConstellationVisualizer SVG component, proper filter handling, detail modal
useRDive36.js: UPDATED to save seeds to both localStorage AND backend API for persistence
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/hooks/useRDive36.js - Added backend API call in mintSeed function

success_rate.frontend: 95% - All features working, only React infinite loop warning

seed_data_creation: Created test seeds via API: TEST_Common Seed, TEST_Sanskrit Deep Dive, TEST_Lakota Wisdom, Frontend Integration Test
context_for_next_testing_agent: All RDive-36 and Seed Gallery features tested and working. Backend API fully functional with 20 tests covering mint, gallery, stats, filters, visibility, rarity calculation. Frontend pages render correctly with all UI elements. mintSeed now saves to both localStorage AND backend API. React infinite loop warning persists from previous iterations but doesn't break functionality.

recursive_dive_page_renders.details: Page renders at /recursive-dive with title 'RECURSIVE DIVE' and '36-BIT COORDINATE NAVIGATOR'

9x9_lattice_grid.details: 81 cells found with hexagram symbols and language indicators

cell_selection_and_dive.details: Click selects cell, double-click triggers Zoom-Snatch dive animation (L0→L1→L2→L3 tested)

void_escape_at_L3.details: VOID ESCAPE button appears at L3+ and instantly returns to L0

mint_seed_localStorage.details: Mint Seed button saves seed to localStorage with seedId, address, depth

mint_seed_backend_api.details: UPDATED: mintSeed now also calls POST /api/seeds/mint to persist to MongoDB

seed_gallery_page_renders.details: Page renders at /seed-gallery with title 'THE LATTICE EXCHANGE'

gallery_stats_panel.details: Stats panel shows Total Seeds, Legendary, Epic, Deep Dives (L4+)

gallery_seed_cards.details: Seed cards display with constellation visualizations, rarity badges, depth/language/rarity info

gallery_detail_modal.details: Clicking seed card opens modal with 36-bit address, journey path, rarity score

gallery_filter_rarity.details: Rarity filter dropdown works (LEGENDARY, EPIC, RARE, UNCOMMON, COMMON)

gallery_filter_depth.details: Depth filter dropdown works (L1+, L2+, L3+, L4+, L5)

gallery_filter_language.details: Language filter dropdown works (Sanskrit, Lakota, Dakota, Japanese, etc.)

backend_api_mint.details: POST /api/seeds/mint creates seeds with correct rarity calculation

backend_api_gallery.details: GET /api/seeds/gallery returns paginated seeds with filters

backend_rarity_calculation.details: Rarity algorithm correctly factors depth, language, sacred hexagrams, dwell history, address patterns

console_errors.impact: Performance degradation but does not break functionality
console_errors.likely_cause: useEffect dependency issue - inherited from previous iterations

console_errors.impact: None - expected in headless browser testing
console_errors.likely_cause: Browser security policy for haptic feedback

data_testid_verified: rdive-mint-seed-button - Mint Seed button in DepthHUD
